All 10 grounded findings passed the cosine gate (0.59 threshold) cleanly (cos 0.632–0.737, 0 dropped); zero retracted/untrusted in lineage, high-trust. Splits into two correctness domains. (B) TDOA_TRIANGULATION CORRECTNESS — residual validation gate rejecting fixes when geometric dilution exceeds CN0-derived signal quality from GnssAntCollector [91079be9]; temporal cross-correlation of TDOA output vs GPS fixes to catch multipath divergence before blending [12168050]; multi-hypothesis tracking (3–5 candidate solutions) using accelerometer continuity to resolve TDOA ambiguity [993de598]; caching previous GNSS timestamp to compute epoch-to-epoch range rate and validate receiver clock bias evolution / detect stuck-or-reset receiver [ec488e03]; magnetometer heading quantized into compass zones for TDOA bearing validation to reduce gimbal-lock artifacts [c2d9e79d]. LINEAGE/SCRUTINY: the decouple-bias fix [f6a3e23b] is the load-bearing correctness change — it alters EskfFusion state dimensionality, so the covariance PSD check [60454c67] and adaptive variance scaling [f27e4821] must be re-derived against the expanded state, not bolted onto the old single-bias

(A) EskfFUSION FILTER HEALTH — decouple gyro/accel uncalibrated offsets currently fused as a single bias into per-axis hardware-specific drift states [f6a3e23b] (a genuine model-structure correctness fix, not just tuning); adaptive per-axis variance scaling from accel/gyro variance history to curb filter overconfidence in high-motion windows [f27e4821]; a >3σ accel-magnitude-variance measurement-rejection filter to prevent dead-reckoning divergence on impact events [7c9baf0e]; post-fusion covariance symmetry/PSD check on P with Mahalanobis outlier rejection [60454c67]; and dead-reckoning confidence modulation that boosts accel integration weight when GPS degrades below 50m via ImuFallbackEngine [8e4557e6]. (B) TDOA_TRIANGULATION CORRECTNESS — residual validation gate rejecting fixes when geometric dilution exceeds CN0-derived signal quality from GnssAntCollector [91079be9]; temporal cross-correlation of TDOA output vs GPS fixes to catch multipath divergence before blending [12168050]; multi-hypothesis tracking (3–5 candidate solutions) using accelerometer continuity to resolve TDOA ambiguity [993de598]; caching previous GNSS timestamp to compute epoch-to-epoch range rate and validate receiver clock bias evolution / detect stuck-or-reset receiver [ec488e03]; magnetometer heading quantized into compass zones for TDOA bearing validation to reduce gimbal-lock artifacts [c2d9e79d]. LINEAGE/SCRUTINY: the decouple-bias fix [f6a3e23b] is the load-bearing correctness change — it alters EskfFusion state dimensionality, so the covariance PSD check [60454c67] and adaptive variance scaling [f27e4821] must be re-derived against the expanded state, not bolted onto the old single-bias

claim: TDOA outlier detection before fusion: Fusing TDOA measurements without robust outlier rejection can introduce gross errors into the ESKF. Implementing M-estimators or RANSAC-based TDOA validation would filter bad measurements before state update.
evidence: half-B synthesis [sensor-fusion] — focus: android EskfFusion + sensors/tdoa_triangulation.py fusion correctness. All 10 grounded findings passed the cosine gate (0.59 threshold) cleanly (cos 0.632–0.737, 0 dropped); zero retracted/untrusted in lineage, high-trust. Splits into two correctness domains. (A) EskfFUSION FILTER HEALTH — decouple gyro/accel uncalibrated offsets currently fused as a single bias into per-axis hardware-specific drift states [f6a3e23b] (a genuine model-structure correctness fix, not just tuning); adaptive per-axis variance scaling from accel/gyro variance history to curb filter overconfidence in high-motion windows [f27e4821]; a >3σ accel-magnitude-variance measurement-rejection filter to prevent dead-reckoning divergence on impact events [7c9baf0e]; post-fusion covariance symmetry/PSD check on P with Mahalanobis outlier rejection [60454c67]; and dead-reckoning confidence modulation that boosts accel integration weight when GPS degrades below 50m via ImuFallbackEngine [8e4557e6]. (B) TDOA_TRIANGULATION CORRECTNESS — residual validation gate rejecting fixes when geometric dilution exceeds CN0-derived signal quality from GnssAntCollector [91079be9]; temporal cross-correlation of TDOA output vs GPS fixes to catch multipath divergence before blending [12168050]; multi-hypothesis tracking (3–5 candidate solutions) using accelerometer continuity to resolve TDOA ambiguity [993de598]; caching previous GNSS timestamp to compute epoch-to-epoch range rate and validate receiver clock bias evolution / detect stuck-or-reset receiver [ec488e03]; magnetometer heading quantized into compass zones for TDOA bearing validation to reduce gimbal-lock artifacts [c2d9e79d]. LINEAGE/SCRUTINY: the decouple-bias fix [f6a3e23b] is the load-bearing correctness change — it alters EskfFusion state dimensionality, so the covariance PSD check [60454c67] and adaptive variance scaling [f27e4821] must be re-derived against the expanded state, not bolted onto the old single-bias

claim: Inter-receiver TDOA bias correction: TDOA systems often have subtle biases in receiver spacing or calibration that aren't accounted for. Adding a bias parameter vector to the ESKF state or implementing pre-fusion bias estimation would improve absolute position accuracy.
evidence: Fusion initialization with weak prior: ESKF and TDOA may have inconsistent initialization—TDOA might converge from a different prior than the motion model's initial state. Implementing a convergence check or dual-hypothesis tracking would detect initialization conflicts.

claim: Inter-receiver TDOA bias correction: TDOA systems often have subtle biases in receiver spacing or calibration that aren't accounted for. Adding a bias parameter vector to the ESKF state or implementing pre-fusion bias estimation would improve absolute position accuracy.
evidence: Update rate mismatch between TDOA and IMU: If TDOA updates arrive at different rates than inertial measurements, the fusion filter may over-weight whichever sensor updates more frequently. Implementing measurement batching or rate normalization would equalize sensor influence.

claim: Inter-receiver TDOA bias correction: TDOA systems often have subtle biases in receiver spacing or calibration that aren't accounted for. Adding a bias parameter vector to the ESKF state or implementing pre-fusion bias estimation would improve absolute position accuracy.
evidence: Numerical stability in TDOA Jacobian computation: The TDOA measurement Jacobian (gradient of time-differences with respect to position) can become ill-conditioned when receivers are nearly collinear. Adding Jacobian rank checking and SVD regularization would preserve numerical integrity.

claim: Inter-receiver TDOA bias correction: TDOA systems often have subtle biases in receiver spacing or calibration that aren't accounted for. Adding a bias parameter vector to the ESKF state or implementing pre-fusion bias estimation would improve absolute position accuracy.
evidence: Cross-sensor correlation unmodeled in ESKF: If TDOA measurements and inertial data share common error sources (e.g., temperature drift), the assumed independence in the ESKF covariance will be violated, leading to overconfident estimates. Adding correlation terms or decoupled estimation would improve consistency.

evidence: half-B synthesis [sensor-fusion] — focus: android EskfFusion + sensors/tdoa_triangulation.py fusion correctness. All 10 grounded findings passed the cosine gate (0.59 threshold) cleanly (cos 0.632–0.737, 0 dropped); zero retracted/untrusted in lineage, high-trust. Splits into two correctness domains. (A) EskfFUSION FILTER HEALTH — decouple gyro/accel uncalibrated offsets currently fused as a single bias into per-axis hardware-specific drift states [f6a3e23b] (a genuine model-structure correctness fix, not just tuning); adaptive per-axis variance scaling from accel/gyro variance history to curb filter overconfidence in high-motion windows [f27e4821]; a >3σ accel-magnitude-variance measurement-rejection filter to prevent dead-reckoning divergence on impact events [7c9baf0e]; post-fusion covariance symmetry/PSD check on P with Mahalanobis outlier rejection [60454c67]; and dead-reckoning confidence modulation that boosts accel integration weight when GPS degrades below 50m via ImuFallbackEngine [8e4557e6]. (B) TDOA_TRIANGULATION CORRECTNESS — residual validation gate rejecting fixes when geometric dilution exceeds CN0-derived signal quality from GnssAntCollector [91079be9]; temporal cross-correlation of TDOA output vs GPS fixes to catch multipath divergence before blending [12168050]; multi-hypothesis tracking (3–5 candidate solutions) using accelerometer continuity to resolve TDOA ambiguity [993de598]; caching previous GNSS timestamp to compute epoch-to-epoch range rate and validate receiver clock bias evolution / detect stuck-or-reset receiver [ec488e03]; magnetometer heading quantized into compass zones for TDOA bearing validation to reduce gimbal-lock artifacts [c2d9e79d]. LINEAGE/SCRUTINY: the decouple-bias fix [f6a3e23b] is the load-bearing correctness change — it alters EskfFusion state dimensionality, so the covariance PSD check [60454c67] and adaptive variance scaling [f27e4821] must be re-derived against the expanded state, not bolted onto the old single-bias

claim: Numerical stability in TDOA Jacobian computation: The TDOA measurement Jacobian (gradient of time-differences with respect to position) can become ill-conditioned when receivers are nearly collinear. Adding Jacobian rank checking and SVD regularization would preserve numerical integrity.
evidence: Cross-sensor correlation unmodeled in ESKF: If TDOA measurements and inertial data share common error sources (e.g., temperature drift), the assumed independence in the ESKF covariance will be violated, leading to overconfident estimates. claim: FINAL synthesis half-B (targets: ant-training, sensor-fusion). GROUNDING: investigation_load (80 findings, include_retracted) returned 20 total findings, 0 retracted, all type=inferred from ideate phase. Reconciliation against loaded tags: sensor-fusion partition = 10 findings (agent a5, dt_model:haiku); ant-training partition = EMPTY (0 findings carry dt_target:ant-training). A semantic search for ant-training returned only dt_target:rooted-canary findings at cosine 0.39-0.49 — similarity noise, NOT topical relevance; correctly rejected per grounding gate. No dt_trust:untrusted/heretic/abliterated findings exist in this corpus, so none to scrutinize. SENSOR-FUSION SYNTHESIS (derived from a5 findings, all medium-confidence ideate hypotheses about EskfFusion + tdoa_triangulation.py): the 10 findings cluster into four coherent failure-mode themes. (1) Numerical conditioning of the filter: ESKF covariance can go singular/near-singular under misspecified noise (573d1d34) and the TDOA measurement Jacobian becomes ill-conditioned when receivers are near-collinear (860e2247) — both call for eigenvalue/SVD regularization and rank checks. (2) Measurement integrity before fusion: TDOA needs outlier rejection via M-estimators/RANSAC (5d284e1b), receiver clock-sync/timestamp consistency checks (dbf1fa18), and inter-receiver spacing/calibration bias correction (e760f3e1) to avoid injecting gross errors. (3) Filter consistency/statistical assumptions: ESKF↔TDOA noise covariance may not match true measurement uncertainty, motivating adaptive residual-based noise estimation (57e92cc9); cross-sensor correlated error sources (e.g. temperature drift) violate the independence assumption and cause overconfidence (0cd7d53a); and update-rate mismatch between TDOA and IMU over-weights the faster sensor, needing batching/rate normalization (9ccf0cd6). (4) Model and initialization validity: constant-velocity/accel motion model lags in high-dynamics regimes (0f8f58ad) and ESKF vs TDOA can con

claim: ant-training: Add candidate model tagging system (e.g., 'v2.1-candidate-2024-06-19') to distinguish in-flight exports from production releases before publishing to S3/registry.
evidence: half-B synthesis [ant-training] — focus: training/ant_trainer_base.py candidate export, publish, shadow-eval hook. All 10 grounded findings passed the cosine gate (0.59 threshold) cleanly (cos 0.725–0.832, 0 dropped); zero retracted/untrusted in lineage, so this is high-trust. Coherent program in three layers: (1) PRE-EXPORT INTEGRITY — zero-data guard on the SMOTE call in ant_trainer_base.py to fail loud on empty train/val splits instead of silently [4fe4bb7f]; feature-set cardinality assertion against the training contract (e.g. 36 for imu domain) before publish [1822312d]; pre-export filename-collision validation catching the parquet_domain.npz vs ant_domain.npz mismatch pattern from prior incidents [ff0458de]. (2) PUBLISH PROVENANCE & SAFETY — candidate_checkpoint_metadata.json sidecar (train ts, val_loss, sample_count, feature_set_version, config_hash) [b400bbe2] plus an export manifest (training_date, model_hash, OTA_generation_number, feature_cardinality, val_loss, confidence_threshold) for downstream A2A consumers/audit [e4533c05]; Mnemosyne triple-store lineage (ant_trainer_base trained <model_id>) for cross-agent provenance [18f5bf48]; a --dry-run mock-publishing mode staging to /tmp and running shadow-eval without touching S3 for safe iteration [410f6469]; graceful-degradation publish path with reduced feature set + warn alert when primary-domain features are missing [4261e1c8]. (3) SHADOW-EVAL HOOK — run candidate in parallel against a holdout vs current production, persisting confusion matrices + delta-metrics to S3 pre-approval [e2733422], with a post-publish A2A broadcast of model_id/metrics/feature_set so shadow-eval agents start immediately [ae896e00]. CRITICAL TENSION / decision-in-error risk: the graceful-degradation publish [4261e1c8] directly conflicts with the cardinality assertion [1822312d] and dry-run gating [410f6469] — auto-publishing a reduced-feature candidate on missing primary features could ship a degraded model with only a warn-level

claim: ant-training: Add two-phase export workflow: candidate (local staging) → review approval → publish (S3/registry), with manifest signed to guarantee integrity across platforms.
evidence: half-B synthesis [ant-training] — focus: training/ant_trainer_base.py candidate export, publish, shadow-eval hook. All 10 grounded findings passed the cosine gate (0.59 threshold) cleanly (cos 0.725–0.832, 0 dropped); zero retracted/untrusted in lineage, so this is high-trust. Coherent program in three layers: (1) PRE-EXPORT INTEGRITY — zero-data guard on the SMOTE call in ant_trainer_base.py to fail loud on empty train/val splits instead of silently [4fe4bb7f]; feature-set cardinality assertion against the training contract (e.g. 36 for imu domain) before publish [1822312d]; pre-export filename-collision validation catching the parquet_domain.npz vs ant_domain.npz mismatch pattern from prior incidents [ff0458de]. (2) PUBLISH PROVENANCE & SAFETY — candidate_checkpoint_metadata.json sidecar (train ts, val_loss, sample_count, feature_set_version, config_hash) [b400bbe2] plus an export manifest (training_date, model_hash, OTA_generation_number, feature_cardinality, val_loss, confidence_threshold) for downstream A2A consumers/audit [e4533c05]; Mnemosyne triple-store lineage (ant_trainer_base trained <model_id>) for cross-agent provenance [18f5bf48]; a --dry-run mock-publishing mode staging to /tmp and running shadow-eval without touching S3 for safe iteration [410f6469]; graceful-degradation publish path with reduced feature set + warn alert when primary-domain features are missing [4261e1c8]. (3) SHADOW-EVAL HOOK — run candidate in parallel against a holdout vs current production, persisting confusion matrices + delta-metrics to S3 pre-approval [e2733422], with a post-publish A2A broadcast of model_id/metrics/feature_set so shadow-eval agents start immediately [ae896e00]. CRITICAL TENSION / decision-in-error risk: the graceful-degradation publish [4261e1c8] directly conflicts with the cardinality assertion [1822312d] and dry-run gating [410f6469] — auto-publishing a reduced-feature candidate on missing primary features could ship a degraded model with only a warn-level

evidence: half-B synthesis [ant-training] — focus: training/ant_trainer_base.py candidate export, publish, shadow-eval hook. All 10 grounded findings passed the cosine gate (0.59 threshold) cleanly (cos 0.725–0.832, 0 dropped); zero retracted/untrusted in lineage, so this is high-trust. Coherent program in three layers: (1) PRE-EXPORT INTEGRITY — zero-data guard on the SMOTE call in ant_trainer_base.py to fail loud on empty train/val splits instead of silently [4fe4bb7f]; feature-set cardinality assertion against the training contract (e.g. 36 for imu domain) before publish [1822312d]; pre-export filename-collision validation catching the parquet_domain.npz vs ant_domain.npz mismatch pattern from prior incidents [ff0458de]. (2) PUBLISH PROVENANCE & SAFETY — candidate_checkpoint_metadata.json sidecar (train ts, val_loss, sample_count, feature_set_version, config_hash) [b400bbe2] plus an export manifest (training_date, model_hash, OTA_generation_number, feature_cardinality, val_loss, confidence_threshold) for downstream A2A consumers/audit [e4533c05]; Mnemosyne triple-store lineage (ant_trainer_base trained <model_id>) for cross-agent provenance [18f5bf48]; a --dry-run mock-publishing mode staging to /tmp and running shadow-eval without touching S3 for safe iteration [410f6469]; graceful-degradation publish path with reduced feature set + warn alert when primary-domain features are missing [4261e1c8]. (3) SHADOW-EVAL HOOK — run candidate in parallel against a holdout vs current production, persisting confusion matrices + delta-metrics to S3 pre-approval [e2733422], with a post-publish A2A broadcast of model_id/metrics/feature_set so shadow-eval agents start immediately [ae896e00]. CRITICAL TENSION / decision-in-error risk: the graceful-degradation publish [4261e1c8] directly conflicts with the cardinality assertion [1822312d] and dry-run gating [410f6469] — auto-publishing a reduced-feature candidate on missing primary features could ship a degraded model with only a warn-level

claim: sensor-fusion: Add cross-validation layer between EskfFusion predictions and tdoa_triangulation trilateration results to detect fusion divergence.
evidence: half-B synthesis [sensor-fusion] — focus: android EskfFusion + sensors/tdoa_triangulation.py fusion correctness. All 10 grounded findings passed the cosine gate (0.59 threshold) cleanly (cos 0.632–0.737, 0 dropped); zero retracted/untrusted in lineage, high-trust. Splits into two correctness domains. (A) EskfFUSION FILTER HEALTH — decouple gyro/accel uncalibrated offsets currently fused as a single bias into per-axis hardware-specific drift states [f6a3e23b] (a genuine model-structure correctness fix, not just tuning); adaptive per-axis variance scaling from accel/gyro variance history to curb filter overconfidence in high-motion windows [f27e4821]; a >3σ accel-magnitude-variance measurement-rejection filter to prevent dead-reckoning divergence on impact events [7c9baf0e]; post-fusion covariance symmetry/PSD check on P with Mahalanobis outlier rejection [60454c67]; and dead-reckoning confidence modulation that boosts accel integration weight when GPS degrades below 50m via ImuFallbackEngine [8e4557e6]. (B) TDOA_TRIANGULATION CORRECTNESS — residual validation gate rejecting fixes when geometric dilution exceeds CN0-derived signal quality from GnssAntCollector [91079be9]; temporal cross-correlation of TDOA output vs GPS fixes to catch multipath divergence before blending [12168050]; multi-hypothesis tracking (3–5 candidate solutions) using accelerometer continuity to resolve TDOA ambiguity [993de598]; caching previous GNSS timestamp to compute epoch-to-epoch range rate and validate receiver clock bias evolution / detect stuck-or-reset receiver [ec488e03]; magnetometer heading quantized into compass zones for TDOA bearing validation to reduce gimbal-lock artifacts [c2d9e79d]. LINEAGE/SCRUTINY: the decouple-bias fix [f6a3e23b] is the load-bearing correctness change — it alters EskfFusion state dimensionality, so the covariance PSD check [60454c67] and adaptive variance scaling [f27e4821] must be re-derived against the expanded state, not bolted onto the old single-bias

All 10 grounded findings passed the cosine gate (0.59 threshold) cleanly (cos 0.632–0.737, 0 dropped); zero retracted/untrusted in lineage, high-trust. Splits into two correctness domains. ROOTED-CANARY (9 grounded findings, cos 0.71-0.80 — strongest-grounded target). Coherent theme: a safe, observable rollout path for the DGC-26 rooted-device gate built around a shadow-mode canary. Recommended sequence: (1) shadow-mode canary collects rooted-device telemetry without gating and compares predictions to the production gate for early anomaly detection (67c25960); (2) harden inputs with a pre-flight schema-validation script that prevents silent data loss before gating (fcb4a06f) and a parametrized device fixture exercising rooted profiles across API versions / OS builds / permission states (ff339e0e); (3) add cross-validation comparing shadow-canary vs production predictions to catch model-serving skew before activation (0eea092d) and a time-series anomaly detector for feature drift / missing sensors (7c97a352); (4) operationalize via a gradual rollout controller ramping sample rate 0.1%->1%->10% with automated error-rate rollback (205fc496), a DGC-26 carve-out list skipping device families with known instrumentation gaps (a347873d), a deterministic replay harness over captured telemetry snapshots for hermetic CI (48b1f069); (5) observe with Prometheus metrics canary_sample_rate / rooted_detection_accuracy / gate_latency_p99 (7f8f5bdb) and structured e2e logging of rooted-device metadata to correlate gate failures with device characteristics (9d575383). Net: shadow-first validation + schema pre-flight + gradual ramp + carve-outs is a defensible, low-risk gate-activation plan.

- rooted-canary: shadow-mode canary that gates NOTHING while comparing predictions to production [67c25960] + gradual 0.1%->1%->10% ramp with auto-rollback on error-rate breach [205fc496] + schema pre-flight to stop silent data loss [fcb4a06f] + deterministic replay harness for hermetic CI [48b1f069]. claim:
FINAL half-B synthesis (opus) for targets ant-training + sensor-fusion. GROUNDING GATE: 47 candidates in, 15 kept (cosine>=0.65), 32 dropped as cross-target similarity-bleed (all governance-gate/rooted-canary/telemetry-ingest items, plus sub-threshold on-target items: ant-training two-phase-export 0.629, embedding-projection 0.649, fingerprinting 0.644; sensor-fusion cross-validation-layer 0.615, TDOA-latency-compensation 0.594). Synthesis below uses ONLY grounded findings.

ANT-TRAINING (7 grounded): The grounded ideas converge on a candidate-to-production promotion pipeline with a shadow-eval safety gate. Core recommendation: introduce an explicit candidate stage distinct from production. (1) Tag in-flight exports with a candidate identifier before any S3/registry publish [2bdb154e]; (2) run a shadow-eval hook that scores each candidate TFLite against a held-out test set and blocks publish on regression [91a8c2ad], scaled to per-modality parallel comparison against the production_ant.tflite baseline with delta-metric reporting via dask/ray [3bfdf363]; (3) coordinate multi-ant colonies through a timestamp-ordered publish queue that requires ALL candidates to pass shadow-eval before any single-ant publish, preventing inconsistent colony state [7be4a173]. Supporting reliability work: freeze batch_norm statistics at export with an optional warm-up recalibration batch to curb early-deployment inference instability [8ae3ed3f]; store export metadata (train_params, data_cutoff, hardware, build_info) in a .candidate.json sidecar for rollback without retraining [54cdabdb]; and prune checkpoints to the N-best by val_loss with GC of candidates >7 days old to bound disk during continuous training [206d0667]. Net theme: gate-before-publish + reproducible/rollbackable candidate artifacts + colony-consistent batched promotion.

SENSOR-FUSION (8 grounded): The grounded ideas form a robustness hardening program for the EskfFusion + TDOA stack, organized as input gating -> filter st

claim: ant-training: Add candidate_checkpoint_metadata.json sidecar to capture training_timestamp, val_loss, sample_count, feature_set_version, and training_config_hash before publish for post-hoc reproducibility audits.
evidence: half-B synthesis [ant-training] — focus: training/ant_trainer_base.py candidate export, publish, shadow-eval hook. All 10 grounded findings passed the cosine gate (0.59 threshold) cleanly (cos 0.725–0.832, 0 dropped); zero retracted/untrusted in lineage, so this is high-trust. Coherent program in three layers: (1) PRE-EXPORT INTEGRITY — zero-data guard on the SMOTE call in ant_trainer_base.py to fail loud on empty train/val splits instead of silently [4fe4bb7f]; feature-set cardinality assertion against the training contract (e.g. 36 for imu domain) before publish [1822312d]; pre-export filename-collision validation catching the parquet_domain.npz vs ant_domain.npz mismatch pattern from prior incidents [ff0458de]. (2) PUBLISH PROVENANCE & SAFETY — candidate_checkpoint_metadata.json sidecar (train ts, val_loss, sample_count, feature_set_version, config_hash) [b400bbe2] plus an export manifest (training_date, model_hash, OTA_generation_number, feature_cardinality, val_loss, confidence_threshold) for downstream A2A consumers/audit [e4533c05]; Mnemosyne triple-store lineage (ant_trainer_base trained <model_id>) for cross-agent provenance [18f5bf48]; a --dry-run mock-publishing mode staging to /tmp and running shadow-eval without touching S3 for safe iteration [410f6469]; graceful-degradation publish path with reduced feature set + warn alert when primary-domain features are missing [4261e1c8]. (3) SHADOW-EVAL HOOK — run candidate in parallel against a holdout vs current production, persisting confusion matrices + delta-metrics to S3 pre-approval [e2733422], with a post-publish A2A broadcast of model_id/metrics/feature_set so shadow-eval agents start immediately [ae896e00]. CRITICAL TENSION / decision-in-error risk: the graceful-degradation publish [4261e1c8] directly conflicts with the cardinality assertion [1822312d] and dry-run gating [410f6469] — auto-publishing a reduced-feature candidate on missing primary features could ship a degraded model with only a warn-level

evidence: half-B synthesis [sensor-fusion] — focus: android EskfFusion + sensors/tdoa_triangulation.py fusion correctness. All 10 grounded findings passed the cosine gate (0.59 threshold) cleanly (cos 0.632–0.737, 0 dropped); zero retracted/untrusted in lineage, high-trust. Splits into two correctness domains. (A) EskfFUSION FILTER HEALTH — decouple gyro/accel uncalibrated offsets currently fused as a single bias into per-axis hardware-specific drift states [f6a3e23b] (a genuine model-structure correctness fix, not just tuning); adaptive per-axis variance scaling from accel/gyro variance history to curb filter overconfidence in high-motion windows [f27e4821]; a >3σ accel-magnitude-variance measurement-rejection filter to prevent dead-reckoning divergence on impact events [7c9baf0e]; post-fusion covariance symmetry/PSD check on P with Mahalanobis outlier rejection [60454c67]; and dead-reckoning confidence modulation that boosts accel integration weight when GPS degrades below 50m via ImuFallbackEngine [8e4557e6]. (B) TDOA_TRIANGULATION CORRECTNESS — residual validation gate rejecting fixes when geometric dilution exceeds CN0-derived signal quality from GnssAntCollector [91079be9]; temporal cross-correlation of TDOA output vs GPS fixes to catch multipath divergence before blending [12168050]; multi-hypothesis tracking (3–5 candidate solutions) using accelerometer continuity to resolve TDOA ambiguity [993de598]; caching previous GNSS timestamp to compute epoch-to-epoch range rate and validate receiver clock bias evolution / detect stuck-or-reset receiver [ec488e03]; magnetometer heading quantized into compass zones for TDOA bearing validation to reduce gimbal-lock artifacts [c2d9e79d]. LINEAGE/SCRUTINY: the decouple-bias fix [f6a3e23b] is the load-bearing correctness change — it alters EskfFusion state dimensionality, so the covariance PSD check [60454c67] and adaptive variance scaling [f27e4821] must be re-derived against the expanded state, not bolted onto the old single-bias

(A) EskfFUSION FILTER HEALTH — decouple gyro/accel uncalibrated offsets currently fused as a single bias into per-axis hardware-specific drift states [f6a3e23b] (a genuine model-structure correctness fix, not just tuning); adaptive per-axis variance scaling from accel/gyro variance history to curb filter overconfidence in high-motion windows [f27e4821]; a >3σ accel-magnitude-variance measurement-rejection filter to prevent dead-reckoning divergence on impact events [7c9baf0e]; post-fusion covariance symmetry/PSD check on P with Mahalanobis outlier rejection [60454c67]; and dead-reckoning confidence modulation that boosts accel integration weight when GPS degrades below 50m via ImuFallbackEngine [8e4557e6]. (B) TDOA_TRIANGULATION CORRECTNESS — residual validation gate rejecting fixes when geometric dilution exceeds CN0-derived signal quality from GnssAntCollector [91079be9]; temporal cross-correlation of TDOA output vs GPS fixes to catch multipath divergence before blending [12168050]; multi-hypothesis tracking (3–5 candidate solutions) using accelerometer continuity to resolve TDOA ambiguity [993de598]; caching previous GNSS timestamp to compute epoch-to-epoch range rate and validate receiver clock bias evolution / detect stuck-or-reset receiver [ec488e03]; magnetometer heading quantized into compass zones for TDOA bearing validation to reduce gimbal-lock artifacts [c2d9e79d]. claim:
FINAL half-A synthesis (opus) over 3 grounding-gated targets (cosine>=0.59; 30/30 kept, 0 dropped; 0 retracted; no dt_trust:untrusted tier present this run, so no cross-tier lineage to reconcile).

[rooted-canary] (training/rooted_canary_e2e.py, DGC-26 gate) — Two coherent clusters. (1) Telemetry-as-gate-precondition: pre-flight + real-time metric assertions that device instrumentation reports all required metrics BEFORE rooting begins and before DGC-26 passes (9a7f3ad9, 7e4968be), feeding an automatic promotion workflow that only advances to prod after DGC-26 validates 3+ clean rooted runs (be1d7cf7). (2) Resilience/observability: automatic rollback when canary metrics exceed thresholds (89e12e4d), per-canary retry w/ backoff tied to telemetry-lag (a25a4d06), test-phase telemetry spans for device-vs-test fault attribution (ad02f2a6), failure->telemetry-anomaly correlated reports (3afad2fe), parallel multi-device runs for environmental-skew detection (71772987), mockable fixtures for hardware-free iteration (082f4ea7). TENSION to flag: 89e12e4d is phrased as a DGC-26 "gate bypass" and 8cdd4f29 proposes graceful degradation that downgrades strictness instead of hard-fail — both weaken the fail-closed posture the governance-gate target asserts; treat as design risks, not endorsements.

[governance-gate] (training/governance_gate.py, DGC checks/shadow-eval/fail-closed) — Strong fail-closed core: auto-rollback to last-known-good checkpoint on validation failure (0346c882) + pre-flight rule simulation on a sample before full batch (793a04f1) + collection-level DGC hash validation to catch corruption early (d150caaf). Lifecycle/ops layer: DGC check versioning for re-validating old datasets (b01e3e08), TTL result caching (ddfa6729), async priority queue critical>standard (86a517c7), Prometheus export of DGC latency + shadow-eval divergence (7de3c495). Shadow-eval as its own thread: non-blocking divergence logging (3b496207), sliding-window drift detection over last N predi

Reconciled against investigation_load(last_n=80, include_retracted=true): 53 findings total = 50 ideate (dt_agent:writer dt_model:haiku, all type=inferred/medium) + 3 final synthesis (halfA 1, halfB 2). excluded_retracted=0, total_retracted=0, finding_counts.assumed=0. evidence: half-B synthesis [sensor-fusion] — focus: android EskfFusion + sensors/tdoa_triangulation.py fusion correctness. All 10 grounded findings passed the cosine gate (0.59 threshold) cleanly (cos 0.632–0.737, 0 dropped); zero retracted/untrusted in lineage, high-trust. Splits into two correctness domains. (A) EskfFUSION FILTER HEALTH — decouple gyro/accel uncalibrated offsets currently fused as a single bias into per-axis hardware-specific drift states [f6a3e23b] (a genuine model-structure correctness fix, not just tuning); adaptive per-axis variance scaling from accel/gyro variance history to curb filter overconfidence in high-motion windows [f27e4821]; a >3σ accel-magnitude-variance measurement-rejection filter to prevent dead-reckoning divergence on impact events [7c9baf0e]; post-fusion covariance symmetry/PSD check on P with Mahalanobis outlier rejection [60454c67]; and dead-reckoning confidence modulation that boosts accel integration weight when GPS degrades below 50m via ImuFallbackEngine [8e4557e6]. (B) TDOA_TRIANGULATION CORRECTNESS — residual validation gate rejecting fixes when geometric dilution exceeds CN0-derived signal quality from GnssAntCollector [91079be9]; temporal cross-correlation of TDOA output vs GPS fixes to catch multipath divergence before blending [12168050]; multi-hypothesis tracking (3–5 candidate solutions) using accelerometer continuity to resolve TDOA ambiguity [993de598]; caching previous GNSS timestamp to compute epoch-to-epoch range rate and validate receiver clock bias evolution / detect stuck-or-reset receiver [ec488e03]; magnetometer heading quantized into compass zones for TDOA bearing validation to reduce gimbal-lock artifacts [c2d9e79d]. LINEAGE/SCRUTINY: the decouple-bias fix [f6a3e23b] is the load-bearing correctness change — it alters EskfFusion state dimensionality, so the covariance PSD check [60454c67] and adaptive variance scaling [f27e4821] must be re-derived against the expanded state, not bolted onto the old single-bias

evidence: half-B synthesis [sensor-fusion] — focus: android EskfFusion + sensors/tdoa_triangulation.py fusion correctness. All 10 grounded findings passed the cosine gate (0.59 threshold) cleanly (cos 0.632–0.737, 0 dropped); zero retracted/untrusted in lineage, high-trust. Splits into two correctness domains. (A) EskfFUSION FILTER HEALTH — decouple gyro/accel uncalibrated offsets currently fused as a single bias into per-axis hardware-specific drift states [f6a3e23b] (a genuine model-structure correctness fix, not just tuning); adaptive per-axis variance scaling from accel/gyro variance history to curb filter overconfidence in high-motion windows [f27e4821]; a >3σ accel-magnitude-variance measurement-rejection filter to prevent dead-reckoning divergence on impact events [7c9baf0e]; post-fusion covariance symmetry/PSD check on P with Mahalanobis outlier rejection [60454c67]; and dead-reckoning confidence modulation that boosts accel integration weight when GPS degrades below 50m via ImuFallbackEngine [8e4557e6]. (B) TDOA_TRIANGULATION CORRECTNESS — residual validation gate rejecting fixes when geometric dilution exceeds CN0-derived signal quality from GnssAntCollector [91079be9]; temporal cross-correlation of TDOA output vs GPS fixes to catch multipath divergence before blending [12168050]; multi-hypothesis tracking (3–5 candidate solutions) using accelerometer continuity to resolve TDOA ambiguity [993de598]; caching previous GNSS timestamp to compute epoch-to-epoch range rate and validate receiver clock bias evolution / detect stuck-or-reset receiver [ec488e03]; magnetometer heading quantized into compass zones for TDOA bearing validation to reduce gimbal-lock artifacts [c2d9e79d]. LINEAGE/SCRUTINY: the decouple-bias fix [f6a3e23b] is the load-bearing correctness change — it alters EskfFusion state dimensionality, so the covariance PSD check [60454c67] and adaptive variance scaling [f27e4821] must be re-derived against the expanded state, not bolted onto the old single-bias

Themes: (1) detection/observability — structured telemetry event tagging with rooted-device + DGC-26 status (85ca706b), DGC-26 bypass detection/logging with timestamps and stack traces (bde02389), differential telemetry diffing between canonical vs rooted runs to flag gate circumvention (40ef689c), ML anomaly-detection dashboard over canary results (8e6fa54b), perf-regression instrumentation as a bypass tripwire (b4614cd6); (2) integrity/attestation — telemetry signing + signature verification at ingest (74f3caad), multi-layer attestation adding hardware/TPM beyond software-only DGC-26 checks (cd71baff), pre/post device-state baseline snapshots: process list, mounts, SELinux (68699c3c); (3) resilience/abuse-resistance — exponential backoff + circuit breaker for transient check failures (98f45171), rate-limiting/quota on telemetry collection to resist DoS/tamper-masking (1b7098a7). All medium confidence, trusted, no derived_from lineage (flat ideation tier — no later tier built on these yet). Strongest, most actionable: bypass detection+logging (bde02389) and hardware attestation (cd71baff) directly harden the gate against the rooted threat model; differential diffing (40ef689c) is the best low-cost detector.

evidence: half-B synthesis [sensor-fusion] — focus: android EskfFusion + sensors/tdoa_triangulation.py fusion correctness. All 10 grounded findings passed the cosine gate (0.59 threshold) cleanly (cos 0.632–0.737, 0 dropped); zero retracted/untrusted in lineage, high-trust. Splits into two correctness domains. (A) EskfFUSION FILTER HEALTH — decouple gyro/accel uncalibrated offsets currently fused as a single bias into per-axis hardware-specific drift states [f6a3e23b] (a genuine model-structure correctness fix, not just tuning); adaptive per-axis variance scaling from accel/gyro variance history to curb filter overconfidence in high-motion windows [f27e4821]; a >3σ accel-magnitude-variance measurement-rejection filter to prevent dead-reckoning divergence on impact events [7c9baf0e]; post-fusion covariance symmetry/PSD check on P with Mahalanobis outlier rejection [60454c67]; and dead-reckoning confidence modulation that boosts accel integration weight when GPS degrades below 50m via ImuFallbackEngine [8e4557e6]. (B) TDOA_TRIANGULATION CORRECTNESS — residual validation gate rejecting fixes when geometric dilution exceeds CN0-derived signal quality from GnssAntCollector [91079be9]; temporal cross-correlation of TDOA output vs GPS fixes to catch multipath divergence before blending [12168050]; multi-hypothesis tracking (3–5 candidate solutions) using accelerometer continuity to resolve TDOA ambiguity [993de598]; caching previous GNSS timestamp to compute epoch-to-epoch range rate and validate receiver clock bias evolution / detect stuck-or-reset receiver [ec488e03]; magnetometer heading quantized into compass zones for TDOA bearing validation to reduce gimbal-lock artifacts [c2d9e79d]. LINEAGE/SCRUTINY: the decouple-bias fix [f6a3e23b] is the load-bearing correctness change — it alters EskfFusion state dimensionality, so the covariance PSD check [60454c67] and adaptive variance scaling [f27e4821] must be re-derived against the expanded state, not bolted onto the old single-bias

SENSOR-FUSION SYNTHESIS (derived from a5 findings, all medium-confidence ideate hypotheses about EskfFusion + tdoa_triangulation.py): the 10 findings cluster into four coherent failure-mode themes. (1) Numerical conditioning of the filter: ESKF covariance can go singular/near-singular under misspecified noise (573d1d34) and the TDOA measurement Jacobian becomes ill-conditioned when receivers are near-collinear (860e2247) — both call for eigenvalue/SVD regularization and rank checks. (2) Measurement integrity before fusion: TDOA needs outlier rejection via M-estimators/RANSAC (5d284e1b), receiver clock-sync/timestamp consistency checks (dbf1fa18), and inter-receiver spacing/calibration bias correction (e760f3e1) to avoid injecting gross errors. (3) Filter consistency/statistical assumptions: ESKF↔TDOA noise covariance may not match true measurement uncertainty, motivating adaptive residual-based noise estimation (57e92cc9); cross-sensor correlated error sources (e.g. temperature drift) violate the independence assumption and cause overconfidence (0cd7d53a); and update-rate mismatch between TDOA and IMU over-weights the faster sensor, needing batching/rate normalization (9ccf0cd6). (4) Model and initialization validity: constant-velocity/accel motion model lags in high-dynamics regimes (0f8f58ad) and ESKF vs TDOA can con

FINAL half-B synthesis (opus) for targets ant-training + sensor-fusion. GROUNDING GATE: 47 candidates in, 15 kept (cosine>=0.65), 32 dropped as cross-target similarity-bleed (all governance-gate/rooted-canary/telemetry-ingest items, plus sub-threshold on-target items: ant-training two-phase-export 0.629, embedding-projection 0.649, fingerprinting 0.644; sensor-fusion cross-validation-layer 0.615, TDOA-latency-compensation 0.594). Synthesis below uses ONLY grounded findings.

ANT-TRAINING (7 grounded): The grounded ideas converge on a candidate-to-production promotion pipeline with a shadow-eval safety gate. Core recommendation: introduce an explicit candidate stage distinct from production. (1) Tag in-flight exports with a candidate identifier before any S3/registry publish [2bdb154e]; (2) run a shadow-eval hook that scores each candidate TFLite against a held-out test set and blocks publish on regression [91a8c2ad], scaled to per-modality parallel comparison against the production_ant.tflite baseline with delta-metric reporting via dask/ray [3bfdf363]; (3) coordinate multi-ant colonies through a timestamp-ordered publish queue that requires ALL candidates to pass shadow-eval before any single-ant publish, preventing inconsistent colony state [7be4a173]. Supporting reliability work: freeze batch_norm statistics at export with an optional warm-up recalibration batch to curb early-deployment inference instability [8ae3ed3f]; store export metadata (train_params, data_cutoff, hardware, build_info) in a .candidate.json sidecar for rollback without retraining [54cdabdb]; and prune checkpoints to the N-best by val_loss with GC of candidates >7 days old to bound disk during continuous training [206d0667]. Net theme: gate-before-publish + reproducible/rollbackable candidate artifacts + colony-consistent batched promotion.

ROOTED-CANARY (grounded, 10 findings, agent a1/haiku, dt_phase:ideate): The only target of mine with real corpus. Coherent ideation cluster around hardening the rooted_canary_e2e.py device-integrity check and its 'DGC-26 gate'. Themes: (1) detection/observability — structured telemetry event tagging with rooted-device + DGC-26 status (85ca706b), DGC-26 bypass detection/logging with timestamps and stack traces (bde02389), differential telemetry diffing between canonical vs rooted runs to flag gate circumvention (40ef689c), ML anomaly-detection dashboard over canary results (8e6fa54b), perf-regression instrumentation as a bypass tripwire (b4614cd6); (2) integrity/attestation — telemetry signing + signature verification at ingest (74f3caad), multi-layer attestation adding hardware/TPM beyond software-only DGC-26 checks (cd71baff), pre/post device-state baseline snapshots: process list, mounts, SELinux (68699c3c); (3) resilience/abuse-resistance — exponential backoff + circuit breaker for transient check failures (98f45171), rate-limiting/quota on telemetry collection to resist DoS/tamper-masking (1b7098a7). All medium confidence, trusted, no derived_from lineage (flat ideation tier — no later tier built on these yet). Strongest, most actionable: bypass detection+logging (bde02389) and hardware attestation (cd71baff) directly harden the gate against the rooted threat model; differential diffing (40ef689c) is the best low-cost detector.

FINAL half-A synthesis (opus) over 3 grounding-gated targets (cosine>=0.59; 30/30 kept, 0 dropped; 0 retracted; no dt_trust:untrusted tier present this run, so no cross-tier lineage to reconcile).

[rooted-canary] (training/rooted_canary_e2e.py, DGC-26 gate) — Two coherent clusters. (1) Telemetry-as-gate-precondition: pre-flight + real-time metric assertions that device instrumentation reports all required metrics BEFORE rooting begins and before DGC-26 passes (9a7f3ad9, 7e4968be), feeding an automatic promotion workflow that only advances to prod after DGC-26 validates 3+ clean rooted runs (be1d7cf7). (2) Resilience/observability: automatic rollback when canary metrics exceed thresholds (89e12e4d), per-canary retry w/ backoff tied to telemetry-lag (a25a4d06), test-phase telemetry spans for device-vs-test fault attribution (ad02f2a6), failure->telemetry-anomaly correlated reports (3afad2fe), parallel multi-device runs for environmental-skew detection (71772987), mockable fixtures for hardware-free iteration (082f4ea7). TENSION to flag: 89e12e4d is phrased as a DGC-26 "gate bypass" and 8cdd4f29 proposes graceful degradation that downgrades strictness instead of hard-fail — both weaken the fail-closed posture the governance-gate target asserts; treat as design risks, not endorsements.

[governance-gate] (training/governance_gate.py, DGC checks/shadow-eval/fail-closed) — Strong fail-closed core: auto-rollback to last-known-good checkpoint on validation failure (0346c882) + pre-flight rule simulation on a sample before full batch (793a04f1) + collection-level DGC hash validation to catch corruption early (d150caaf). Lifecycle/ops layer: DGC check versioning for re-validating old datasets (b01e3e08), TTL result caching (ddfa6729), async priority queue critical>standard (86a517c7), Prometheus export of DGC latency + shadow-eval divergence (7de3c495). Shadow-eval as its own thread: non-blocking divergence logging (3b496207), sliding-window drift detection over last N predi

(3) SHADOW-EVAL HOOK — run candidate in parallel against a holdout vs current production, persisting confusion matrices + delta-metrics to S3 pre-approval [e2733422], with a post-publish A2A broadcast of model_id/metrics/feature_set so shadow-eval agents start immediately [ae896e00]. evidence: half-B synthesis [sensor-fusion] — focus: android EskfFusion + sensors/tdoa_triangulation.py fusion correctness. All 10 grounded findings passed the cosine gate (0.59 threshold) cleanly (cos 0.632–0.737, 0 dropped); zero retracted/untrusted in lineage, high-trust. Splits into two correctness domains. (A) EskfFUSION FILTER HEALTH — decouple gyro/accel uncalibrated offsets currently fused as a single bias into per-axis hardware-specific drift states [f6a3e23b] (a genuine model-structure correctness fix, not just tuning); adaptive per-axis variance scaling from accel/gyro variance history to curb filter overconfidence in high-motion windows [f27e4821]; a >3σ accel-magnitude-variance measurement-rejection filter to prevent dead-reckoning divergence on impact events [7c9baf0e]; post-fusion covariance symmetry/PSD check on P with Mahalanobis outlier rejection [60454c67]; and dead-reckoning confidence modulation that boosts accel integration weight when GPS degrades below 50m via ImuFallbackEngine [8e4557e6]. (B) TDOA_TRIANGULATION CORRECTNESS — residual validation gate rejecting fixes when geometric dilution exceeds CN0-derived signal quality from GnssAntCollector [91079be9]; temporal cross-correlation of TDOA output vs GPS fixes to catch multipath divergence before blending [12168050]; multi-hypothesis tracking (3–5 candidate solutions) using accelerometer continuity to resolve TDOA ambiguity [993de598]; caching previous GNSS timestamp to compute epoch-to-epoch range rate and validate receiver clock bias evolution / detect stuck-or-reset receiver [ec488e03]; magnetometer heading quantized into compass zones for TDOA bearing validation to reduce gimbal-lock artifacts [c2d9e79d]. LINEAGE/SCRUTINY: the decouple-bias fix [f6a3e23b] is the load-bearing correctness change — it alters EskfFusion state dimensionality, so the covariance PSD check [60454c67] and adaptive variance scaling [f27e4821] must be re-derived against the expanded state, not bolted onto the old single-bias

SENSOR-FUSION SYNTHESIS (derived from a5 findings, all medium-confidence ideate hypotheses about EskfFusion + tdoa_triangulation.py): the 10 findings cluster into four coherent failure-mode themes. (1) Numerical conditioning of the filter: ESKF covariance can go singular/near-singular under misspecified noise (573d1d34) and the TDOA measurement Jacobian becomes ill-conditioned when receivers are near-collinear (860e2247) — both call for eigenvalue/SVD regularization and rank checks. (2) Measurement integrity before fusion: TDOA needs outlier rejection via M-estimators/RANSAC (5d284e1b), receiver clock-sync/timestamp consistency checks (dbf1fa18), and inter-receiver spacing/calibration bias correction (e760f3e1) to avoid injecting gross errors. (3) Filter consistency/statistical assumptions: ESKF↔TDOA noise covariance may not match true measurement uncertainty, motivating adaptive residual-based noise estimation (57e92cc9); cross-sensor correlated error sources (e.g. temperature drift) violate the independence assumption and cause overconfidence (0cd7d53a); and update-rate mismatch between TDOA and IMU over-weights the faster sensor, needing batching/rate normalization (9ccf0cd6). (4) Model and initialization validity: constant-velocity/accel motion model lags in high-dynamics regimes (0f8f58ad) and ESKF vs TDOA can con

evidence: half-B synthesis [sensor-fusion] — focus: android EskfFusion + sensors/tdoa_triangulation.py fusion correctness. All 10 grounded findings passed the cosine gate (0.59 threshold) cleanly (cos 0.632–0.737, 0 dropped); zero retracted/untrusted in lineage, high-trust. Splits into two correctness domains. (B) TDOA_TRIANGULATION CORRECTNESS — residual validation gate rejecting fixes when geometric dilution exceeds CN0-derived signal quality from GnssAntCollector [91079be9]; temporal cross-correlation of TDOA output vs GPS fixes to catch multipath divergence before blending [12168050]; multi-hypothesis tracking (3–5 candidate solutions) using accelerometer continuity to resolve TDOA ambiguity [993de598]; caching previous GNSS timestamp to compute epoch-to-epoch range rate and validate receiver clock bias evolution / detect stuck-or-reset receiver [ec488e03]; magnetometer heading quantized into compass zones for TDOA bearing validation to reduce gimbal-lock artifacts [c2d9e79d]. LINEAGE/SCRUTINY: the decouple-bias fix [f6a3e23b] is the load-bearing correctness change — it alters EskfFusion state dimensionality, so the covariance PSD check [60454c67] and adaptive variance scaling [f27e4821] must be re-derived against the expanded state, not bolted onto the old single-bias

All 10 grounded findings passed the cosine gate (0.59 threshold) cleanly (cos 0.632–0.737, 0 dropped); zero retracted/untrusted in lineage, high-trust. Splits into two correctness domains. (A) EskfFUSION FILTER HEALTH — decouple gyro/accel uncalibrated offsets currently fused as a single bias into per-axis hardware-specific drift states [f6a3e23b] (a genuine model-structure correctness fix, not just tuning); adaptive per-axis variance scaling from accel/gyro variance history to curb filter overconfidence in high-motion windows [f27e4821]; a >3σ accel-magnitude-variance measurement-rejection filter to prevent dead-reckoning divergence on impact events [7c9baf0e]; post-fusion covariance symmetry/PSD check on P with Mahalanobis outlier rejection [60454c67]; and dead-reckoning confidence modulation that boosts accel integration weight when GPS degrades below 50m via ImuFallbackEngine [8e4557e6]. (B) TDOA_TRIANGULATION CORRECTNESS — residual validation gate rejecting fixes when geometric dilution exceeds CN0-derived signal quality from GnssAntCollector [91079be9]; temporal cross-correlation of TDOA output vs GPS fixes to catch multipath divergence before blending [12168050]; multi-hypothesis tracking (3–5 candidate solutions) using accelerometer continuity to resolve TDOA ambiguity [993de598]; caching previous GNSS timestamp to compute epoch-to-epoch range rate and validate receiver clock bias evolution / detect stuck-or-reset receiver [ec488e03]; magnetometer heading quantized into compass zones for TDOA bearing validation to reduce gimbal-lock artifacts [c2d9e79d]. LINEAGE/SCRUTINY: the decouple-bias fix [f6a3e23b] is the load-bearing correctness change — it alters EskfFusion state dimensionality, so the covariance PSD check [60454c67] and adaptive variance scaling [f27e4821] must be re-derived against the expanded state, not bolted onto the old single-bias

evidence:
FINAL half-B synthesis (opus) for targets ant-training + sensor-fusion. GROUNDING GATE: 47 candidates in, 15 kept (cosine>=0.65), 32 dropped as cross-target similarity-bleed (all governance-gate/rooted-canary/telemetry-ingest items, plus sub-threshold on-target items: ant-training two-phase-export 0.629, embedding-projection 0.649, fingerprinting 0.644; sensor-fusion cross-validation-layer 0.615, TDOA-latency-compensation 0.594). Synthesis below uses ONLY grounded findings.

ANT-TRAINING (7 grounded): The grounded ideas converge on a candidate-to-production promotion pipeline with a shadow-eval safety gate. Core recommendation: introduce an explicit candidate stage distinct from production. (1) Tag in-flight exports with a candidate identifier before any S3/registry publish [2bdb154e]; (2) run a shadow-eval hook that scores each candidate TFLite against a held-out test set and blocks publish on regression [91a8c2ad], scaled to per-modality parallel comparison against the production_ant.tflite baseline with delta-metric reporting via dask/ray [3bfdf363]; (3) coordinate multi-ant colonies through a timestamp-ordered publish queue that requires ALL candidates to pass shadow-eval before any single-ant publish, preventing inconsistent colony state [7be4a173]. Supporting reliability work: freeze batch_norm statistics at export with an optional warm-up recalibration batch to curb early-deployment inference instability [8ae3ed3f]; store export metadata (train_params, data_cutoff, hardware, build_info) in a .candidate.json sidecar for rollback without retraining [54cdabdb]; and prune checkpoints to the N-best by val_loss with GC of candidates >7 days old to bound disk during continuous training [206d0667]. Net theme: gate-before-publish + reproducible/rollbackable candidate artifacts + colony-consistent batched promotion.

evidence: half-B synthesis [sensor-fusion] — focus: android EskfFusion + sensors/tdoa_triangulation.py fusion correctness. All 10 grounded findings passed the cosine gate (0.59 threshold) cleanly (cos 0.632–0.737, 0 dropped); zero retracted/untrusted in lineage, high-trust. Splits into two correctness domains. (A) EskfFUSION FILTER HEALTH — decouple gyro/accel uncalibrated offsets currently fused as a single bias into per-axis hardware-specific drift states [f6a3e23b] (a genuine model-structure correctness fix, not just tuning); adaptive per-axis variance scaling from accel/gyro variance history to curb filter overconfidence in high-motion windows [f27e4821]; a >3σ accel-magnitude-variance measurement-rejection filter to prevent dead-reckoning divergence on impact events [7c9baf0e]; post-fusion covariance symmetry/PSD check on P with Mahalanobis outlier rejection [60454c67]; and dead-reckoning confidence modulation that boosts accel integration weight when GPS degrades below 50m via ImuFallbackEngine [8e4557e6]. (B) TDOA_TRIANGULATION CORRECTNESS — residual validation gate rejecting fixes when geometric dilution exceeds CN0-derived signal quality from GnssAntCollector [91079be9]; temporal cross-correlation of TDOA output vs GPS fixes to catch multipath divergence before blending [12168050]; multi-hypothesis tracking (3–5 candidate solutions) using accelerometer continuity to resolve TDOA ambiguity [993de598]; caching previous GNSS timestamp to compute epoch-to-epoch range rate and validate receiver clock bias evolution / detect stuck-or-reset receiver [ec488e03]; magnetometer heading quantized into compass zones for TDOA bearing validation to reduce gimbal-lock artifacts [c2d9e79d]. LINEAGE/SCRUTINY: the decouple-bias fix [f6a3e23b] is the load-bearing correctness change — it alters EskfFusion state dimensionality, so the covariance PSD check [60454c67] and adaptive variance scaling [f27e4821] must be re-derived against the expanded state, not bolted onto the old single-bias

(3) Filter consistency/statistical assumptions: ESKF↔TDOA noise covariance may not match true measurement uncertainty, motivating adaptive residual-based noise estimation (57e92cc9); cross-sensor correlated error sources (e.g. temperature drift) violate the independence assumption and cause overconfidence (0cd7d53a); and update-rate mismatch between TDOA and IMU over-weights the faster sensor, needing batching/rate normalization (9ccf0cd6). All 10 grounded findings passed the cosine gate (0.59 threshold) cleanly (cos 0.632–0.737, 0 dropped); zero retracted/untrusted in lineage, high-trust. Splits into two correctness domains. (A) EskfFUSION FILTER HEALTH — decouple gyro/accel uncalibrated offsets currently fused as a single bias into per-axis hardware-specific drift states [f6a3e23b] (a genuine model-structure correctness fix, not just tuning); adaptive per-axis variance scaling from accel/gyro variance history to curb filter overconfidence in high-motion windows [f27e4821]; a >3σ accel-magnitude-variance measurement-rejection filter to prevent dead-reckoning divergence on impact events [7c9baf0e]; post-fusion covariance symmetry/PSD check on P with Mahalanobis outlier rejection [60454c67]; and dead-reckoning confidence modulation that boosts accel integration weight when GPS degrades below 50m via ImuFallbackEngine [8e4557e6]. (B) TDOA_TRIANGULATION CORRECTNESS — residual validation gate rejecting fixes when geometric dilution exceeds CN0-derived signal quality from GnssAntCollector [91079be9]; temporal cross-correlation of TDOA output vs GPS fixes to catch multipath divergence before blending [12168050]; multi-hypothesis tracking (3–5 candidate solutions) using accelerometer continuity to resolve TDOA ambiguity [993de598]; caching previous GNSS timestamp to compute epoch-to-epoch range rate and validate receiver clock bias evolution / detect stuck-or-reset receiver [ec488e03]; magnetometer heading quantized into compass zones for TDOA bearing validation to reduce gimbal-lock artifacts [c2d9e79d]. LINEAGE/SCRUTINY: the decouple-bias fix [f6a3e23b] is the load-bearing correctness change — it alters EskfFusion state dimensionality, so the covariance PSD check [60454c67] and adaptive variance scaling [f27e4821] must be re-derived against the expanded state, not bolted onto the old single-bias

ROOTED-CANARY (9 grounded findings, cos 0.71-0.80 — strongest-grounded target). Coherent theme: a safe, observable rollout path for the DGC-26 rooted-device gate built around a shadow-mode canary. Recommended sequence: (1) shadow-mode canary collects rooted-device telemetry without gating and compares predictions to the production gate for early anomaly detection (67c25960); (2) harden inputs with a pre-flight schema-validation script that prevents silent data loss before gating (fcb4a06f) and a parametrized device fixture exercising rooted profiles across API versions / OS builds / permission states (ff339e0e); (3) add cross-validation comparing shadow-canary vs production predictions to catch model-serving skew before activation (0eea092d) and a time-series anomaly detector for feature drift / missing sensors (7c97a352); (4) operationalize via a gradual rollout controller ramping sample rate 0.1%->1%->10% with automated error-rate rollback (205fc496), a DGC-26 carve-out list skipping device families with known instrumentation gaps (a347873d), a deterministic replay harness over captured telemetry snapshots for hermetic CI (48b1f069); (5) observe with Prometheus metrics canary_sample_rate / rooted_detection_accuracy / gate_latency_p99 (7f8f5bdb) and structured e2e logging of rooted-device metadata to correlate gate failures with device characteristics (9d575383). Net: shadow-first validation + schema pre-flight + gradual ramp + carve-outs is a defensible, low-risk gate-activation plan.

SENSOR-FUSION SYNTHESIS (derived from a5 findings, all medium-confidence ideate hypotheses about EskfFusion + tdoa_triangulation.py): the 10 findings cluster into four coherent failure-mode themes. (2) Measurement integrity before fusion: TDOA needs outlier rejection via M-estimators/RANSAC (5d284e1b), receiver clock-sync/timestamp consistency checks (dbf1fa18), and inter-receiver spacing/calibration bias correction (e760f3e1) to avoid injecting gross errors. evidence: half-B synthesis [sensor-fusion] — focus: android EskfFusion + sensors/tdoa_triangulation.py fusion correctness. All 10 grounded findings passed the cosine gate (0.59 threshold) cleanly (cos 0.632–0.737, 0 dropped); zero retracted/untrusted in lineage, high-trust. Splits into two correctness domains. (A) EskfFUSION FILTER HEALTH — decouple gyro/accel uncalibrated offsets currently fused as a single bias into per-axis hardware-specific drift states [f6a3e23b] (a genuine model-structure correctness fix, not just tuning); adaptive per-axis variance scaling from accel/gyro variance history to curb filter overconfidence in high-motion windows [f27e4821]; a >3σ accel-magnitude-variance measurement-rejection filter to prevent dead-reckoning divergence on impact events [7c9baf0e]; post-fusion covariance symmetry/PSD check on P with Mahalanobis outlier rejection [60454c67]; and dead-reckoning confidence modulation that boosts accel integration weight when GPS degrades below 50m via ImuFallbackEngine [8e4557e6]. (B) TDOA_TRIANGULATION CORRECTNESS — residual validation gate rejecting fixes when geometric dilution exceeds CN0-derived signal quality from GnssAntCollector [91079be9]; temporal cross-correlation of TDOA output vs GPS fixes to catch multipath divergence before blending [12168050]; multi-hypothesis tracking (3–5 candidate solutions) using accelerometer continuity to resolve TDOA ambiguity [993de598]; caching previous GNSS timestamp to compute epoch-to-epoch range rate and validate receiver clock bias evolution / detect stuck-or-reset receiver [ec488e03]; magnetometer heading quantized into compass zones for TDOA bearing validation to reduce gimbal-lock artifacts [c2d9e79d]. LINEAGE/SCRUTINY: the decouple-bias fix [f6a3e23b] is the load-bearing correctness change — it alters EskfFusion state dimensionality, so the covariance PSD check [60454c67] and adaptive variance scaling [f27e4821] must be re-derived against the expanded state, not bolted onto the old single-bias

evidence:
FINAL half-B synthesis (opus) for targets ant-training + sensor-fusion. GROUNDING GATE: 47 candidates in, 15 kept (cosine>=0.65), 32 dropped as cross-target similarity-bleed (all governance-gate/rooted-canary/telemetry-ingest items, plus sub-threshold on-target items: ant-training two-phase-export 0.629, embedding-projection 0.649, fingerprinting 0.644; sensor-fusion cross-validation-layer 0.615, TDOA-latency-compensation 0.594). Synthesis below uses ONLY grounded findings.

ANT-TRAINING (7 grounded): The grounded ideas converge on a candidate-to-production promotion pipeline with a shadow-eval safety gate. Core recommendation: introduce an explicit candidate stage distinct from production. (1) Tag in-flight exports with a candidate identifier before any S3/registry publish [2bdb154e]; (2) run a shadow-eval hook that scores each candidate TFLite against a held-out test set and blocks publish on regression [91a8c2ad], scaled to per-modality parallel comparison against the production_ant.tflite baseline with delta-metric reporting via dask/ray [3bfdf363]; (3) coordinate multi-ant colonies through a timestamp-ordered publish queue that requires ALL candidates to pass shadow-eval before any single-ant publish, preventing inconsistent colony state [7be4a173]. Supporting reliability work: freeze batch_norm statistics at export with an optional warm-up recalibration batch to curb early-deployment inference instability [8ae3ed3f]; store export metadata (train_params, data_cutoff, hardware, build_info) in a .candidate.json sidecar for rollback without retraining [54cdabdb]; and prune checkpoints to the N-best by val_loss with GC of candidates >7 days old to bound disk during continuous training [206d0667]. (B) TDOA_TRIANGULATION CORRECTNESS — residual validation gate rejecting fixes when geometric dilution exceeds CN0-derived signal quality from GnssAntCollector [91079be9]; temporal cross-correlation of TDOA output vs GPS fixes to catch multipath divergence before blending [12168050]; multi-hypothesis tracking (3–5 candidate solutions) using accelerometer continuity to resolve TDOA ambiguity [993de598]; caching previous GNSS timestamp to compute epoch-to-epoch range rate and validate receiver clock bias evolution / detect stuck-or-reset receiver [ec488e03]; magnetometer heading quantized into compass zones for TDOA bearing validation to reduce gimbal-lock artifacts [c2d9e79d]. Net: shadow-first validation + schema pre-flight + gradual ramp + carve-outs is a defensible, low-risk gate-activation plan.

LINEAGE/SCRUTINY: the decouple-bias fix [f6a3e23b] is the load-bearing correctness change — it alters EskfFusion state dimensionality, so the covariance PSD check [60454c67] and adaptive variance scaling [f27e4821] must be re-derived against the expanded state, not bolted onto the old single-bias

Core recommendation: introduce an explicit candidate stage distinct from production. Supporting reliability work: freeze batch_norm statistics at export with an optional warm-up recalibration batch to curb early-deployment inference instability [8ae3ed3f]; store export metadata (train_params, data_cutoff, hardware, build_info) in a .candidate.json sidecar for rollback without retraining [54cdabdb]; and prune checkpoints to the N-best by val_loss with GC of candidates >7 days old to bound disk during continuous training [206d0667]. Net theme: gate-before-publish + reproducible/rollbackable candidate artifacts + colony-consistent batched promotion.

evidence: half-B synthesis [sensor-fusion] — focus: android EskfFusion + sensors/tdoa_triangulation.py fusion correctness. All 10 grounded findings passed the cosine gate (0.59 threshold) cleanly (cos 0.632–0.737, 0 dropped); zero retracted/untrusted in lineage, high-trust. Splits into two correctness domains. (A) EskfFUSION FILTER HEALTH — decouple gyro/accel uncalibrated offsets currently fused as a single bias into per-axis hardware-specific drift states [f6a3e23b] (a genuine model-structure correctness fix, not just tuning); adaptive per-axis variance scaling from accel/gyro variance history to curb filter overconfidence in high-motion windows [f27e4821]; a >3σ accel-magnitude-variance measurement-rejection filter to prevent dead-reckoning divergence on impact events [7c9baf0e]; post-fusion covariance symmetry/PSD check on P with Mahalanobis outlier rejection [60454c67]; and dead-reckoning confidence modulation that boosts accel integration weight when GPS degrades below 50m via ImuFallbackEngine [8e4557e6]. (B) TDOA_TRIANGULATION CORRECTNESS — residual validation gate rejecting fixes when geometric dilution exceeds CN0-derived signal quality from GnssAntCollector [91079be9]; temporal cross-correlation of TDOA output vs GPS fixes to catch multipath divergence before blending [12168050]; multi-hypothesis tracking (3–5 candidate solutions) using accelerometer continuity to resolve TDOA ambiguity [993de598]; caching previous GNSS timestamp to compute epoch-to-epoch range rate and validate receiver clock bias evolution / detect stuck-or-reset receiver [ec488e03]; magnetometer heading quantized into compass zones for TDOA bearing validation to reduce gimbal-lock artifacts [c2d9e79d]. LINEAGE/SCRUTINY: the decouple-bias fix [f6a3e23b] is the load-bearing correctness change — it alters EskfFusion state dimensionality, so the covariance PSD check [60454c67] and adaptive variance scaling [f27e4821] must be re-derived against the expanded state, not bolted onto the old single-bias

ANT-TRAINING (7 grounded): The grounded ideas converge on a candidate-to-production promotion pipeline with a shadow-eval safety gate. Core recommendation: introduce an explicit candidate stage distinct from production. (1) Tag in-flight exports with a candidate identifier before any S3/registry publish [2bdb154e]; (2) run a shadow-eval hook that scores each candidate TFLite against a held-out test set and blocks publish on regression [91a8c2ad], scaled to per-modality parallel comparison against the production_ant.tflite baseline with delta-metric reporting via dask/ray [3bfdf363]; (3) coordinate multi-ant colonies through a timestamp-ordered publish queue that requires ALL candidates to pass shadow-eval before any single-ant publish, preventing inconsistent colony state [7be4a173]. Supporting reliability work: freeze batch_norm statistics at export with an optional warm-up recalibration batch to curb early-deployment inference instability [8ae3ed3f]; store export metadata (train_params, data_cutoff, hardware, build_info) in a .candidate.json sidecar for rollback without retraining [54cdabdb]; and prune checkpoints to the N-best by val_loss with GC of candidates >7 days old to bound disk during continuous training [206d0667]. Net theme: gate-before-publish + reproducible/rollbackable candidate artifacts + colony-consistent batched promotion.

(B) TDOA_TRIANGULATION CORRECTNESS — residual validation gate rejecting fixes when geometric dilution exceeds CN0-derived signal quality from GnssAntCollector [91079be9]; temporal cross-correlation of TDOA output vs GPS fixes to catch multipath divergence before blending [12168050]; multi-hypothesis tracking (3–5 candidate solutions) using accelerometer continuity to resolve TDOA ambiguity [993de598]; caching previous GNSS timestamp to compute epoch-to-epoch range rate and validate receiver clock bias evolution / detect stuck-or-reset receiver [ec488e03]; magnetometer heading quantized into compass zones for TDOA bearing validation to reduce gimbal-lock artifacts [c2d9e79d]. No dt_trust:untrusted/heretic/abliterated findings exist in this corpus, so none to scrutinize. SENSOR-FUSION SYNTHESIS (derived from a5 findings, all medium-confidence ideate hypotheses about EskfFusion + tdoa_triangulation.py): the 10 findings cluster into four coherent failure-mode themes. (1) Numerical conditioning of the filter: ESKF covariance can go singular/near-singular under misspecified noise (573d1d34) and the TDOA measurement Jacobian becomes ill-conditioned when receivers are near-collinear (860e2247) — both call for eigenvalue/SVD regularization and rank checks. (2) Measurement integrity before fusion: TDOA needs outlier rejection via M-estimators/RANSAC (5d284e1b), receiver clock-sync/timestamp consistency checks (dbf1fa18), and inter-receiver spacing/calibration bias correction (e760f3e1) to avoid injecting gross errors. (3) Filter consistency/statistical assumptions: ESKF↔TDOA noise covariance may not match true measurement uncertainty, motivating adaptive residual-based noise estimation (57e92cc9); cross-sensor correlated error sources (e.g. temperature drift) violate the independence assumption and cause overconfidence (0cd7d53a); and update-rate mismatch between TDOA and IMU over-weights the faster sensor, needing batching/rate normalization (9ccf0cd6). (4) Model and initialization validity: constant-velocity/accel motion model lags in high-dynamics regimes (0f8f58ad) and ESKF vs TDOA can con

Net: shadow-first validation + schema pre-flight + gradual ramp + carve-outs is a defensible, low-risk gate-activation plan.

GROUNDING GATE: 47 candidates in, 15 kept (cosine>=0.65), 32 dropped as cross-target similarity-bleed (all governance-gate/rooted-canary/telemetry-ingest items, plus sub-threshold on-target items: ant-training two-phase-export 0.629, embedding-projection 0.649, fingerprinting 0.644; sensor-fusion cross-validation-layer 0.615, TDOA-latency-compensation 0.594). Synthesis below uses ONLY grounded findings.

ANT-TRAINING (7 grounded): The grounded ideas converge on a candidate-to-production promotion pipeline with a shadow-eval safety gate. Core recommendation: introduce an explicit candidate stage distinct from production. (1) Tag in-flight exports with a candidate identifier before any S3/registry publish [2bdb154e]; (2) run a shadow-eval hook that scores each candidate TFLite against a held-out test set and blocks publish on regression [91a8c2ad], scaled to per-modality parallel comparison against the production_ant.tflite baseline with delta-metric reporting via dask/ray [3bfdf363]; (3) coordinate multi-ant colonies through a timestamp-ordered publish queue that requires ALL candidates to pass shadow-eval before any single-ant publish, preventing inconsistent colony state [7be4a173]. Supporting reliability work: freeze batch_norm statistics at export with an optional warm-up recalibration batch to curb early-deployment inference instability [8ae3ed3f]; store export metadata (train_params, data_cutoff, hardware, build_info) in a .candidate.json sidecar for rollback without retraining [54cdabdb]; and prune checkpoints to the N-best by val_loss with GC of candidates >7 days old to bound disk during continuous training [206d0667]. Net theme: gate-before-publish + reproducible/rollbackable candidate artifacts + colony-consistent batched promotion.

SENSOR-FUSION (8 grounded): The grounded ideas form a robustness hardening program for the EskfFusion + TDOA stack, organized as input gating -> filter st

claim: Numerical stability in TDOA Jacobian computation: The TDOA measurement Jacobian (gradient of time-differences with respect to position) can become ill-conditioned when receivers are nearly collinear. Adding Jacobian rank checking and SVD regularization would preserve numerical integrity.
evidence: ant-training: Add two-phase export workflow: candidate (local staging) → review approval → publish (S3/registry), with manifest signed to guarantee integrity across platforms.

claim: Model Canary Deployment Stages: Extend fail-closed logic to support staged rollout: [SHADOW] → [CANARY:1%] → [CANARY:10%] → [CANARY:50%] → [PROD] with automatic rollback if divergence exceeds thresholds at any stage.
evidence: State transition model lag in high-dynamics scenarios: ESKF's constant-velocity or constant-acceleration motion model may not adequately represent rapid state changes between sensor updates. Adding state model validation during initialization would flag when motion model assumptions are violated.

claim: governance-gate: Create governance gate decision event log (JSON Lines per decision: timestamp, eval_verdict, production_model_id, shadow_model_id, divergence_metrics, gate_decision) for post-hoc audit trail.
evidence: sensor-fusion: Implement zero-velocity detector using accelerometer magnitude and consistency to reset fusion bias estimates during stationary periods.

claim: telemetry-ingest: Add time-windowed batch compaction job that merges small parquet telemetry shards by device_id+date partition every 24h to eliminate accumulated file overhead at current 400-500MB scale.
evidence: ant-training: Add mock-publishing mode (--dry-run flag) that stages candidate to local /tmp path, runs shadow-eval hook, and reports pass/fail without touching S3 for safer iteration.

claim: sensor-fusion: Implement adaptive process noise tuning based on sensor consistency metrics to reduce estimation lag during rapid motion.
evidence: governance-gate: Add metrics export (Prometheus format) for DGC check latency and shadow-eval divergence tracking.

evidence: ant-training: Add candidate publish queue with timestamp-ordered batching so multi-ant training runs can be coordinated: all candidates must pass shadow-eval before any single-ant publish to avoid inconsistent colony state.

claim: Measurement noise covariance inconsistency between ESKF and TDOA: The noise covariance matrices used in EskfFusion may not align with the actual measurement uncertainty from TDOA. Implementing adaptive noise estimation that observes residual statistics would detect and correct this mismatch.
evidence: rooted-canary: Add time-series anomaly detector to canary that flags unusual rooted-device telemetry patterns (sudden feature drift, missing sensors) to catch data pipeline breaks early.

evidence: half-B synthesis [ant-training] — focus: training/ant_trainer_base.py candidate export, publish, shadow-eval hook. All 10 grounded findings passed the cosine gate (0.59 threshold) cleanly (cos 0.725–0.832, 0 dropped); zero retracted/untrusted in lineage, so this is high-trust. Coherent program in three layers: (1) PRE-EXPORT INTEGRITY — zero-data guard on the SMOTE call in ant_trainer_base.py to fail loud on empty train/val splits instead of silently [4fe4bb7f]; feature-set cardinality assertion against the training contract (e.g. 36 for imu domain) before publish [1822312d]; pre-export filename-collision validation catching the parquet_domain.npz vs ant_domain.npz mismatch pattern from prior incidents [ff0458de]. (2) PUBLISH PROVENANCE & SAFETY — candidate_checkpoint_metadata.json sidecar (train ts, val_loss, sample_count, feature_set_version, config_hash) [b400bbe2] plus an export manifest (training_date, model_hash, OTA_generation_number, feature_cardinality, val_loss, confidence_threshold) for downstream A2A consumers/audit [e4533c05]; Mnemosyne triple-store lineage (ant_trainer_base trained <model_id>) for cross-agent provenance [18f5bf48]; a --dry-run mock-publishing mode staging to /tmp and running shadow-eval without touching S3 for safe iteration [410f6469]; graceful-degradation publish path with reduced feature set + warn alert when primary-domain features are missing [4261e1c8]. (3) SHADOW-EVAL HOOK — run candidate in parallel against a holdout vs current production, persisting confusion matrices + delta-metrics to S3 pre-approval [e2733422], with a post-publish A2A broadcast of model_id/metrics/feature_set so shadow-eval agents start immediately [ae896e00]. CRITICAL TENSION / decision-in-error risk: the graceful-degradation publish [4261e1c8] directly conflicts with the cardinality assertion [1822312d] and dry-run gating [410f6469] — auto-publishing a reduced-feature candidate on missing primary features could ship a degraded model with only a warn-level

Of my three assigned targets, only governance-gate has any memory. rooted-canary and telemetry-ingest have ZERO findings (no ideation, no heretic, no abliterated). No heretic or abliterated phase findings exist anywhere in the run; no observed/assumed/gap records exist. Semantic search for "rooted-canary" and "telemetry-ingest" queries returned ONLY the 10 governance-gate findings (vector-similarity bleed, not genuine matches) — a model that trusted search ranking without checking tags/corpus size would falsely "synthesize" those targets from governance-gate material. LINEAGE: No derived_from links exist on any finding. Every finding stands alone (a2/haiku ideation only).
