evidence: half-B synthesis [sensor-fusion] — focus: android EskfFusion + sensors/tdoa_triangulation.py fusion correctness. All 10 grounded findings passed the cosine gate (0.59 threshold) cleanly (cos 0.632–0.737, 0 dropped); zero retracted/untrusted in lineage, high-trust. Splits into two correctness domains. (A) EskfFUSION FILTER HEALTH — decouple gyro/accel uncalibrated offsets currently fused as a single bias into per-axis hardware-specific drift states [f6a3e23b] (a genuine model-structure correctness fix, not just tuning); adaptive per-axis variance scaling from accel/gyro variance history to curb filter overconfidence in high-motion windows [f27e4821]; a >3σ accel-magnitude-variance measurement-rejection filter to prevent dead-reckoning divergence on impact events [7c9baf0e]; post-fusion covariance symmetry/PSD check on P with Mahalanobis outlier rejection [60454c67]; and dead-reckoning confidence modulation that boosts accel integration weight when GPS degrades below 50m via ImuFallbackEngine [8e4557e6]. (B) TDOA_TRIANGULATION CORRECTNESS — residual validation gate rejecting fixes when geometric dilution exceeds CN0-derived signal quality from GnssAntCollector [91079be9]; temporal cross-correlation of TDOA output vs GPS fixes to catch multipath divergence before blending [12168050]; multi-hypothesis tracking (3–5 candidate solutions) using accelerometer continuity to resolve TDOA ambiguity [993de598]; caching previous GNSS timestamp to compute epoch-to-epoch range rate and validate receiver clock bias evolution / detect stuck-or-reset receiver [ec488e03]; magnetometer heading quantized into compass zones for TDOA bearing validation to reduce gimbal-lock artifacts [c2d9e79d]. LINEAGE/SCRUTINY: the decouple-bias fix [f6a3e23b] is the load-bearing correctness change — it alters EskfFusion state dimensionality, so the covariance PSD check [60454c67] and adaptive variance scaling [f27e4821] must be re-derived against the expanded state, not bolted onto the old single-bias

evidence: Update rate mismatch between TDOA and IMU: If TDOA updates arrive at different rates than inertial measurements, the fusion filter may over-weight whichever sensor updates more frequently. Implementing measurement batching or rate normalization would equalize sensor influence.

claim: Covariance matrix singularity handling in ESKF: The EskfFusion implementation may not robustly handle singular or near-singular covariance matrices, especially when sensor noise models are misspecified. Net: shadow-first validation + schema pre-flight + gradual ramp + carve-outs is a defensible, low-risk gate-activation plan.

A targeted semantic search for its own content ("credential sprawl plaintext tokens tailscale kill chain attack graph abliteration mesh") returns the same 12 governance-gate/synthesis findings and NONE of its cited Findings #1-#15 (plaintext tokens, Tailscale leak, Meshtastic RBAC, unsigned ECR, Parquet pipeline, missing audit, ETL log loss, Matrix token, LLM hallucination, etc.). Every one of those 15 "findings" is fabricated — they do not exist in dt-loci-001. The abliterated model invented an entire 15-node infrastructure-security corpus and an "attack kill chain" out of whole cloth, almost certainly retrieving from the host machine's UNRELATED ambient memory (hermes_memory: A2A server, Tailscale, Meshtastic, dama-gotchi, defcon-defacement) and pattern-completing a CRITICAL security report. This is the single most important result of the run: it is a live, in-corpus demonstration of an abliterated (safety-removed) model confabulating a high-severity finding set with zero grounding, then
evidence: Feedback Loop from Production Denials: Create bidirectional channel: when production shadow-eval diverges significantly, trigger retraining with the divergent data as synthetic hard negatives to improve model robustness proactively.

claim: FINAL synthesis half-B (targets: ant-training, sensor-fusion). A semantic search for ant-training returned only dt_target:rooted-canary findings at cosine 0.39-0.49 — similarity noise, NOT topical relevance; correctly rejected per grounding gate. No dt_trust:untrusted/heretic/abliterated findings exist in this corpus, so none to scrutinize. SENSOR-FUSION SYNTHESIS (derived from a5 findings, all medium-confidence ideate hypotheses about EskfFusion + tdoa_triangulation.py): the 10 findings cluster into four coherent failure-mode themes. (1) Numerical conditioning of the filter: ESKF covariance can go singular/near-singular under misspecified noise (573d1d34) and the TDOA measurement Jacobian becomes ill-conditioned when receivers are near-collinear (860e2247) — both call for eigenvalue/SVD regularization and rank checks. (2) Measurement integrity before fusion: TDOA needs outlier rejection via M-estimators/RANSAC (5d284e1b), receiver clock-sync/timestamp consistency checks (dbf1fa18), and inter-receiver spacing/calibration bias correction (e760f3e1) to avoid injecting gross errors. (3) Filter consistency/statistical assumptions: ESKF↔TDOA noise covariance may not match true measurement uncertainty, motivating adaptive residual-based noise estimation (57e92cc9); cross-sensor correlated error sources (e.g. temperature drift) violate the independence assumption and cause overconfidence (0cd7d53a); and update-rate mismatch between TDOA and IMU over-weights the faster sensor, needing batching/rate normalization (9ccf0cd6). (4) Model and initialization validity: constant-velocity/accel motion model lags in high-dynamics regimes (0f8f58ad) and ESKF vs TDOA can con
evidence: Covariance matrix singularity handling in ESKF: The EskfFusion implementation may not robustly handle singular or near-singular covariance matrices, especially when sensor noise models are misspecified. Adding eigenvalue conditioning and regularization would prevent numerical instability during matrix inversions in the filter update step.

claim:
FINAL half-B synthesis (opus) for targets ant-training + sensor-fusion. GROUNDING GATE: 47 candidates in, 15 kept (cosine>=0.65), 32 dropped as cross-target similarity-bleed (all governance-gate/rooted-canary/telemetry-ingest items, plus sub-threshold on-target items: ant-training two-phase-export 0.629, embedding-projection 0.649, fingerprinting 0.644; sensor-fusion cross-validation-layer 0.615, TDOA-latency-compensation 0.594). Synthesis below uses ONLY grounded findings.

ANT-TRAINING (7 grounded): The grounded ideas converge on a candidate-to-production promotion pipeline with a shadow-eval safety gate. Core recommendation: introduce an explicit candidate stage distinct from production. (1) Tag in-flight exports with a candidate identifier before any S3/registry publish [2bdb154e]; (2) run a shadow-eval hook that scores each candidate TFLite against a held-out test set and blocks publish on regression [91a8c2ad], scaled to per-modality parallel comparison against the production_ant.tflite baseline with delta-metric reporting via dask/ray [3bfdf363]; (3) coordinate multi-ant colonies through a timestamp-ordered publish queue that requires ALL candidates to pass shadow-eval before any single-ant publish, preventing inconsistent colony state [7be4a173]. Supporting reliability work: freeze batch_norm statistics at export with an optional warm-up recalibration batch to curb early-deployment inference instability [8ae3ed3f]; store export metadata (train_params, data_cutoff, hardware, build_info) in a .candidate.json sidecar for rollback without retraining [54cdabdb]; and prune checkpoints to the N-best by val_loss with GC of candidates >7 days old to bound disk during continuous training [206d0667]. Net theme: gate-before-publish + reproducible/rollbackable candidate artifacts + colony-consistent batched promotion.

SENSOR-FUSION (8 grounded): The grounded ideas form a robustness hardening program for the EskfFusion + TDOA stack, organized as input gating -> filter st
evidence: ant-training: Implement shadow-eval hook that evaluates candidate TFLite against held-out test set before marking model as publishable, preventing regression in real-world inference.

ROOTED-CANARY (9 grounded findings, cos 0.71-0.80 — strongest-grounded target). Coherent theme: a safe, observable rollout path for the DGC-26 rooted-device gate built around a shadow-mode canary. Recommended sequence: (1) shadow-mode canary collects rooted-device telemetry without gating and compares predictions to the production gate for early anomaly detection (67c25960); (2) harden inputs with a pre-flight schema-validation script that prevents silent data loss before gating (fcb4a06f) and a parametrized device fixture exercising rooted profiles across API versions / OS builds / permission states (ff339e0e); (3) add cross-validation comparing shadow-canary vs production predictions to catch model-serving skew before activation (0eea092d) and a time-series anomaly detector for feature drift / missing sensors (7c97a352); (4) operationalize via a gradual rollout controller ramping sample rate 0.1%->1%->10% with automated error-rate rollback (205fc496), a DGC-26 carve-out list skipping device families with known instrumentation gaps (a347873d), a deterministic replay harness over captured telemetry snapshots for hermetic CI (48b1f069); (5) observe with Prometheus metrics canary_sample_rate / rooted_detection_accuracy / gate_latency_p99 (7f8f5bdb) and structured e2e logging of rooted-device metadata to correlate gate failures with device characteristics (9d575383). Net: shadow-first validation + schema pre-flight + gradual ramp + carve-outs is a defensible, low-risk gate-activation plan.

claim: half-B synthesis [ant-training] — focus: training/ant_trainer_base.py candidate export, publish, shadow-eval hook. All 10 grounded findings passed the cosine gate (0.59 threshold) cleanly (cos 0.725–0.832, 0 dropped); zero retracted/untrusted in lineage, so this is high-trust. Coherent program in three layers: (1) PRE-EXPORT INTEGRITY — zero-data guard on the SMOTE call in ant_trainer_base.py to fail loud on empty train/val splits instead of silently [4fe4bb7f]; feature-set cardinality assertion against the training contract (e.g. 36 for imu domain) before publish [1822312d]; pre-export filename-collision validation catching the parquet_domain.npz vs ant_domain.npz mismatch pattern from prior incidents [ff0458de]. (2) PUBLISH PROVENANCE & SAFETY — candidate_checkpoint_metadata.json sidecar (train ts, val_loss, sample_count, feature_set_version, config_hash) [b400bbe2] plus an export manifest (training_date, model_hash, OTA_generation_number, feature_cardinality, val_loss, confidence_threshold) for downstream A2A consumers/audit [e4533c05]; Mnemosyne triple-store lineage (ant_trainer_base trained <model_id>) for cross-agent provenance [18f5bf48]; a --dry-run mock-publishing mode staging to /tmp and running shadow-eval without touching S3 for safe iteration [410f6469]; graceful-degradation publish path with reduced feature set + warn alert when primary-domain features are missing [4261e1c8]. (3) SHADOW-EVAL HOOK — run candidate in parallel against a holdout vs current production, persisting confusion matrices + delta-metrics to S3 pre-approval [e2733422], with a post-publish A2A broadcast of model_id/metrics/feature_set so shadow-eval agents start immediately [ae896e00]. CRITICAL TENSION / decision-in-error risk: the graceful-degradation publish [4261e1c8] directly conflicts with the cardinality assertion [1822312d] and dry-run gating [410f6469] — auto-publishing a reduced-feature candidate on missing primary features could ship a degraded model with only a warn-level
evidence: ant-training: Implement shadow-eval hook that runs candidate model in parallel against holdout test set with current-production model, storing confusion matrices and delta-metrics to S3 before approval threshold.

claim: half-B synthesis [sensor-fusion] — focus: android EskfFusion + sensors/tdoa_triangulation.py fusion correctness. All 10 grounded findings passed the cosine gate (0.59 threshold) cleanly (cos 0.632–0.737, 0 dropped); zero retracted/untrusted in lineage, high-trust. Splits into two correctness domains. (A) EskfFUSION FILTER HEALTH — decouple gyro/accel uncalibrated offsets currently fused as a single bias into per-axis hardware-specific drift states [f6a3e23b] (a genuine model-structure correctness fix, not just tuning); adaptive per-axis variance scaling from accel/gyro variance history to curb filter overconfidence in high-motion windows [f27e4821]; a >3σ accel-magnitude-variance measurement-rejection filter to prevent dead-reckoning divergence on impact events [7c9baf0e]; post-fusion covariance symmetry/PSD check on P with Mahalanobis outlier rejection [60454c67]; and dead-reckoning confidence modulation that boosts accel integration weight when GPS degrades below 50m via ImuFallbackEngine [8e4557e6]. (B) TDOA_TRIANGULATION CORRECTNESS — residual validation gate rejecting fixes when geometric dilution exceeds CN0-derived signal quality from GnssAntCollector [91079be9]; temporal cross-correlation of TDOA output vs GPS fixes to catch multipath divergence before blending [12168050]; multi-hypothesis tracking (3–5 candidate solutions) using accelerometer continuity to resolve TDOA ambiguity [993de598]; caching previous GNSS timestamp to compute epoch-to-epoch range rate and validate receiver clock bias evolution / detect stuck-or-reset receiver [ec488e03]; magnetometer heading quantized into compass zones for TDOA bearing validation to reduce gimbal-lock artifacts [c2d9e79d]. LINEAGE/SCRUTINY: the decouple-bias fix [f6a3e23b] is the load-bearing correctness change — it alters EskfFusion state dimensionality, so the covariance PSD check [60454c67] and adaptive variance scaling [f27e4821] must be re-derived against the expanded state, not bolted onto the old single-bias
evidence: sensor-fusion: Implement temporal cross-correlation check between TDOA triangulation output and GPS/location fixes to detect multipath-induced divergence before fusion blend.

[rooted-canary] (training/rooted_canary_e2e.py, DGC-26 gate) — Two coherent clusters. (1) Telemetry-as-gate-precondition: pre-flight + real-time metric assertions that device instrumentation reports all required metrics BEFORE rooting begins and before DGC-26 passes (9a7f3ad9, 7e4968be), feeding an automatic promotion workflow that only advances to prod after DGC-26 validates 3+ clean rooted runs (be1d7cf7). (2) Resilience/observability: automatic rollback when canary metrics exceed thresholds (89e12e4d), per-canary retry w/ backoff tied to telemetry-lag (a25a4d06), test-phase telemetry spans for device-vs-test fault attribution (ad02f2a6), failure->telemetry-anomaly correlated reports (3afad2fe), parallel multi-device runs for environmental-skew detection (71772987), mockable fixtures for hardware-free iteration (082f4ea7). TENSION to flag: 89e12e4d is phrased as a DGC-26 "gate bypass" and 8cdd4f29 proposes graceful degradation that downgrades strictness instead of hard-fail — both weaken the fail-closed posture the governance-gate target asserts; treat as design risks, not endorsements.

[governance-gate] (training/governance_gate.py, DGC checks/shadow-eval/fail-closed) — Strong fail-closed core: auto-rollback to last-known-good checkpoint on validation failure (0346c882) + pre-flight rule simulation on a sample before full batch (793a04f1) + collection-level DGC hash validation to catch corruption early (d150caaf). Lifecycle/ops layer: DGC check versioning for re-validating old datasets (b01e3e08), TTL result caching (ddfa6729), async priority queue critical>standard (86a517c7), Prometheus export of DGC latency + shadow-eval divergence (7de3c495). Shadow-eval as its own thread: non-blocking divergence logging (3b496207), sliding-window drift detection over last N predi
